module.dummy.title: Trigger
module.trigger.description:
### Tips
* The auto assist runs in background mode and does not block other on-demand tasks.
* Enable 'Auto F' to automatically handle interaction pickup prompts.
* Enable 'Nita Auto E' to automatically press E during QTE stages.
module.trigger.log.trigger_skipped_all_o: Trigger skipped: all options are disabled
